name: Bank of America Financial Center
description_short: Bank of America Financial Center in Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood offering full-service banking, financial advice, and walk-up ATM services during extended hours.
description_long:
Bank of America is one of the largest banking institutions in the United States, and this specific location is a full-service financial center in the Kensington neighborhood of Philadelphia at 1841 E Allegheny Ave. The branch operates as a traditional banking hub combining in-person services with modern digital banking capabilities. This Financial Center has been established to serve the local community's banking and financial planning needs across multiple customer segments.

The location offers comprehensive banking services including in-person financial consultations, notary services, commercial deposits, cash acceptance for non-customer checks, and ATM services. The walk-up ATM is accessible with extended hours and supports multiple transaction types including deposits and credit card payments. The facility accepts appointments for customers wanting to meet with specialists to discuss personal banking, home loans, business accounts, and wealth management solutions. The ATM provides multilingual instructions in English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese, alongside cardless and tap-to-pay capabilities.

What distinguishes this branch is its position as a full-service financial center rather than a limited-service location, combined with appointment-based specialist access and extended Saturday hours (9 AM–2 PM). The integration of walk-up ATM access, in-person advisory services, and mobile banking options creates a omnichannel approach. The facility specifically markets itself as serving customers across different financial life stages—from personal account management to business development and home ownership planning. The multilingual ATM interface reflects the neighborhood's demographic diversity.

This location is best suited for Bank of America customers seeking in-person banking support, those requiring notary services, small business owners needing to deposit funds, and customers who prefer local specialist guidance for financial planning. The extended hours and Saturday availability provide accessibility beyond typical weekday business hours. However, customers should note that ATM hours vary and this is a specific neighborhood location without the comprehensive product range of larger regional centers.
address: 135 S LaSalle St Suite LL18, Chicago, IL 60603

company_info.headquarters: 135 S LaSalle St Suite LL18, Chicago, IL 60603

pros: Full-service financial center with on-site specialists available by appointment
Walk-up ATM with extended weekend hours (Saturday 9 AM–2 PM) and multilingual interface (7 languages)
Accepts notary services and commercial deposits on-site
Cardless and tap-to-pay ATM capabilities for contactless transactions
Appointment scheduling system for meeting with financial specialists
ATM accepts deposits and credit card payments for multiple transaction types
Serves personal banking, business, and wealth management customers
cons: Limited weekday hours (9 AM–4 PM) restrict access for working professionals outside standard business hours
ATM hours listed as 'vary at this location,' creating uncertainty about consistent access
As a specific branch location, product and service offerings may be more limited than corporate headquarters or major regional centers
Walk-up ATM accessibility depends on weather and neighborhood conditions (Kensington area has known safety concerns not mentioned in website)
No 24/7 in-person banking; Saturday closure after 2 PM and all-day Sunday closure limits weekend access
best_for: Bank of America customers in the Kensington neighborhood needing in-person account management and ATM access
Small business owners in Philadelphia requiring commercial deposit services and business banking consultations
Customers requiring notary services at a banking location
Non-English speakers needing ATM access with multilingual interface support
diagnosis: This Bank of America Financial Center location is best for existing Bank of America customers or new customers in the Kensington area seeking full-service banking with appointment-based specialist access. The main caveat is that this is a standard neighborhood branch location with limited weekday hours and variable ATM hours, not a 24/7 facility or premium banking center, so accessibility outside business hours is restricted.
services: In-person financial consultation and advisory services
Specialist appointments for personal, business, and wealth management planning
Walk-up ATM services with extended hours
ATM deposits and credit card payments
Multilingual ATM interface (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese)
Mobile banking app support and enrollment
